offer.headline: Halal Nut-Free Healthy Lunch Special
offer.body_line: Enjoy a Japanese-inspired bowl, 15% off, valid 15 minutes.
offer.image_prompt: A colorful halal nut-free Japanese healthy lunch bowl with vegetables and grilled chicken, steam rising, on a wooden table, soft lighting

why_now_factors: Matches user dietary halal and nut-free, preferred cuisine japanese, fits quick lunch intent, respects max discount 15% (<20% cap) and $ value, validity within 15 min limit, targets conference lunch rush to fill quiet hours.
